description_long: This shotgun features a robust, angular design with a predominantly black body accented by metallic copper and gold elements. The barrel is thick and squared, with two parallel tubes suggesting a double-barrel configuration, and is reinforced with copper-colored plates. The receiver is solid and blocky, with a visible ejection port and a set of metallic prongs or rails beneath the barrel. The stock is compact and angular, finished in a matching copper tone, and the grip is integrated into the rear section, appearing ergonomic and sturdy. The top of the shotgun has a raised rail or sighting mechanism, and the overall construction suggests a modern, tactical aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, angular double-barrel shotgun with a black body and copper accents, featuring a compact stock and reinforced barrel. The design is robust and tactical, with visible rails and metallic details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the twin barrel openings, copper barrel reinforcements, and the angular, symmetrical muzzle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the shotgun, the ejection port, metallic rails, and the compact, angular stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the copper-finished stock, the top rail, and the overall symmetry of the shotgun's design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the barrel, rails, and stock, with additional detail on the grip and trigger area.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with squared, reinforced barrels and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rectangular trigger guard with a squared profile and no visible finger grooves
